div.span:
2. Dashboard sends
follow-up message or
user initiates

4. Graph initializes state
with incident context
& MCP tools

6. Selected specialist runs
(K8s, metrics, logs,
code, or runbooks)

7. Supervisor reviews
new evidence and decides
continue or summarize

9. Timeline + incident summary
persisted to PostgreSQL

10. Live state/logs updated
for polling and follow-up

13. Operator reviews findings
and decides on remediation
